channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — May 10, 2026
item.description: Ongoing tensions in the Middle East continue with renewed Israeli strikes in Lebanon and U.S. actions against Iranian tankers in the Strait of Hormuz. Russia marks Victory Day with a scaled-back parade, as reports of continued fighting emerge despite...

item.title: The VENCAst — May 09, 2026
item.description: Good day. You are tuned into The VENCAst, your daily briefing on global events, European developments, and the latest in science and technology. Today is Saturday, May 09, 2026. I am your Friendly Neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, here to provide you with...

item.title: The VENCAst — May 08, 2026
item.description: Here is the significantly expanded podcast script, aiming for over 3500 words while maintaining the original structure, tone, and style.
